nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

en.lifeSummary: Sibylla FitzWilliam was born in 1133, in Hinton Martel, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William FitzWilliam de Sprotborough and Avice de Tania. She had at least 3 sons with Ralph I de Tilly. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Sibylla FitzWilliam est née en 1133, à Hinton Martel, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de William FitzWilliam de Sprotborough et Avice de Tania. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Ralph I de Tilly. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

it.lifeSummary: Sibylla FitzWilliam è nata il nel 1133 nel Hinton Martel, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di William FitzWilliam de Sprotborough e Avice de Tania. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Ralph I de Tilly. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylla FitzWilliamは1133年にイギリスイギリスドールセトヒントン マルテルでWilliam FitzWilliam de SprotboroughとAvice de Taniaの娘として生まれた。彼女はRalph I de Tillyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibylla FitzWilliam(은)는 1133년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 인턴 마텔에서 William FitzWilliam de Sprotborough(와)과 Avice de Tania의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Ralph I de Tilly(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.
